title: Microsoft Purview Unified Catalog — business domains
description: Desired state for Unified Catalog business domains consumed by scripts/Deploy-UnifiedCatalog.ps1 (tracked in #340). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/purview/purview-unified-catalog/business-domain/get. Renamed from governance-domains.schema.json per ADR 0047 §Decision item 5 to match the 2026-03-20-preview API's Business Domain operation group; the concept is unchanged.

items.description: List of business domains. Default state is the empty list.

name.description: Display name. Unique across the file.

type.description: Domain category. Enum reflects the Unified Catalog UI options as of 2026-05-24.

owners.description: Entra group display names. Resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023.
